Title: Ali's Dream Castle
Storyline: The movie "Ali's dream castle" will be released on August 17, 2024. The main characters are himself, his teammates Xiao Zhong and Paper-man. It's a pity that Mika, Shadow, Da Xiong and Ali's girlfriend Taozi were not invited to play. In the movie he starred in, Ali and his team members Nao Xiaozhong and Paper Man were regarded as an incompetent and useless team (they even collected cats' dreams, and of course they often made fools of themselves in the process of collecting dreams) in the dream-collecting team (the dream-collecting team members usually used dream-collecting knives to collect other people's dream balloons. In the morning, they could know their performance by inserting their own dream-collecting knives into the clock-in place), and were often laughed at by others (once they could only collect one dream in one night). However, one day, Ali accidentally collected the dream of a blind girl, Tongtong, because her dream was special (dreams have 5 colors in the movie, which are in the shape of balloons, which can be called dream balloons. Red is an adventurous dream, pink is a dream about love, yellow is a warm dream, blue is a sad dream, and black is a nightmare. However, only in legends can there be the appearance of colorful dreams, which represent the best dreams in the world. However, Tongtong is blind and her dreams are transparent, but that night, her dreams turned into colorful dreams under the light, which made Ali misjudge) and therefore the fate of the two has been closely linked since then. As Ali and the little girl become good friends, the Dream City has also encountered an unprecedented crisis (as urban people go to bed later and later, the quality of sleep is getting worse and worse, so there are not many good dreams available for the Dream City. The Dream City is supported by the dreams collected by the dream-collecting team members. Without the support of beautiful dreams, the Dream City wrapped in the dream balloon will soon fall due to lack of buoyancy. Led by the King of the Dream City, and with his foreign assistant Ike, they jointly developed the Dream Crystal, which can purify human dreams and inspire people's imagination, but it also has significant side effects. As people still have control over their own consciousness, the dreams inspired by the Dream Crystal will most likely evolve into nightmares, and nightmares are even worse for the current situation of the Dream City). Because his dream-collecting team is related to the legend of the colorful dream (misjudgment), he is favored by the King of the Dream City. In the movie, Ali became the hero who saved the Dream City because he solved the crisis of the Dream City. In the end, Nao Xiaozhong and Paper Man, members of Ali's dream-collecting team, also died in the dream because of the crisis, and defeated the villains led by the king (in fact, the king developed the dream crystal for the Dream City. He took a fancy to Tongtong's dream, because her dream was colorless, so he could let the dream crystal play freely, so he took Tongtong back (in order to perfunctory Ali, the king also awarded him the title of dream-collecting hero) and couldn't wait to do the experiment. Because Ali found the loophole, and he couldn't let Tongtong go, so he decided to rescue Tongtong, so the king asked Ike to drive Ali out of the Dream City. Ali also fell into the Dream City Scar. By chance, he met the old king, who had been living in seclusion here waiting for this day. The old king gave Ali some advice and shared with him, he said: "Dreams come from the heart, life is It is in the process of love and giving that things become meaningful. "Ali understood, and the king gave him a pet (the pet looked like a monster, but the old king still called him cute). With the help of the old king, Ali rushed back to the Dream City. At the same time, the current king ignored the fact that Tongtong still had hearing, because Tongtong was blind and could not go to ordinary kindergarten. In the end, a big accident developed, and the king was also eroded by the dream crystal and became a villain. Ali also became a real hero because he defeated the villains led by the king (Ali jumped into Tongtong's dream and fought with the king in it. Fortunately, he brought nightmare eliminator, which was said to be brought by Xiaozhong. In the end, he successfully purified Tongtong's dream and turned Tongtong's dream into a colorful dream, but could not save the Dream City). But in the movie"s easter egg, Xiaozhong and the paper man did not sacrifice, because Tongtong's nightmare was purified and the dream balloon fell out. As for the Dream City, Ali also changed it. The dream collectors in the Dream City no longer collected other people's sweet dreams. Instead, they collected other people's nightmares and brought them to the Dream City for purification, which became the energy to support the Dream City. Tongtong also found his own kindergarten.

Title: Upanga Kingdom
Storyline: In the heart of Upanga Kingdom, a realm plagued by corruption and fear, Claiborne, a determined French-British plant researcher, embarks on a treacherous expedition. His mission: to unearth a legendary tree that holds the cure his late professor believed could save his ailing wife. But as he steps into this kingdom of darkness, he finds himself entangled in a dangerous game of power orchestrated by the ruthless Mr. Interpreter, a leader who manipulates his authority for personal gain. Claiborne's pursuit of hope becomes a fight for survival as he faces extortion and even the threat of his own life. Amidst the chaos, Claiborne crosses paths with Julieth, a resilient woman who holds the key to his mission's success. Overcoming language barriers with bribes and deceit, he forges an alliance with Julieth. However, their partnership takes a tragic turn, pushing them to the brink of despair. As corruption reigns and traditional values clash with modern ambitions, Hilda, a fearless teenager, emerges as a beacon of change. Determined to shatter the chains of oppression, she defies societal norms to challenge the established order. But can she overcome the odds stacked against her as she strives to pave the way for a new era of justice? 'Upanga Kingdom' is a gripping tale of courage, sacrifice, and redemption, where the battle for a better future unfolds against a backdrop of betrayal and adversity. Will Claiborne, Julieth, and Hilda's paths converge to topple the tyrants and heal a wounded land? Get ready for an epic journey through a realm where the power of the human spirit knows no bounds.

Journey with us to the Centre County Grange Fair, where generations come together to celebrate the timeless beauty of community, culture, and camaraderie. It's more than just a fair. It's a tradition that's been passed down through generations. Discover the heartwarming stories that make the Centre County Grange Fair a cherished tradition for all who visit. Join us as we embark on a journey through 150 years of tradition, laughter, and memories.

This film highlights the importance of remembrance and the enduring legacy of Jewish identity in a land marked by tragedy.

Title: Kivun ja ilon työ
Storyline: Birth is one of the most natural yet most regulated experiences in a woman's life. Why does society still dictate where and how it should happen, and why is giving birth at home seen as a radical, almost rebellious act? Finnish documentary Karoliina Gröndahl explores these questions in her deeply personal and unflinchingly honest film. Following several pregnant women, as well as midwife Kirsi and doula Anna-Riitta, she examines childbirth as both a physical and spiritual experience where trust and choice matter more than medical protocol. Her camera captures, with raw precision, the physical and emotional intensity of women in labor rooms, where the miracle of life coexists with pain, fear, and the struggle to maintain control over one's own body.

The second production from Haddock Theatre and Film Company, Bathtub Oncology is an exploration of the family unit with themes of class, institution, government, and health.

Title: Pontus Hultén: Succéerna och Brilloskandalen
Storyline: Pontus Hultén (1924-2006) was a pioneer in art world and a visionary who put Moderna Museet in Sweden on the international art map. He took Pop Art to Stockholm before it even became known where it originated in the United States. He held the world's first solo exhibition with Andy Warhol, in Stockholm 1968. After that, Pontus Hultén made an international career and built one of the world's leading art museums in Europe, for instance the world-famous Center Pompidou in Paris. By establishing museums around the world, he created an unparalleled platform for modern art. But even the most brilliant career can have dark shadows. The documentary also explores the controversial scandal surrounding Andy Warhol's Brilloboxes. A mysterious and dirty affair that tarnished his reputation after his death. The film meets his closest family and colleagues and gives a new intimate picture of this world star and his legacy.

Her journey to Arizona transforms into a reflective meditation on memory, connection, and the universal threads that shape us all. Inspiring and introspective, the film celebrates the beauty of healing and embracing life's complexities.

Title: It is Only Sound that Remains
Storyline: For years, anyone who dares to play an instrument, sing a melody, or even listen to music is condemned to burn in the fire. Music has abandoned the world, taking with it the gift of language and expression. Silence reigns supreme, and humanity withers - bodies refuse nourishment, instincts grow quiet, and the only remaining yearning is the desperate desire to hear a single note again. In this darkened world, a girl watches helplessly as her parents and grandmother fade away, their lives slipping through her fingers. Unsure of how to bring music back to them, she sets out on a journey to rediscover its lost magic. Along the way, she encounters a mysterious orchestra conductor who reveals an extraordinary secret: the art of awakening music within others through the power of imagination. But the path is fraught with danger, and her resolve will be tested at every turn. This is a story of hope, defiance, and the unyielding human need for art, even in a world that seeks to silence it forever.

Title: Passo a due
Storyline: Supervised by director Alice Diop, six young directors produced stories centered around their direction of six actors and actresses, selected through a joint casting process.

Title: Harmoni
Storyline: Inspired by a true story about two farming families in Bali and Gorontalo. Made (60) a seaweed farmer in Nusa Lembongan, Bali, he insisted on maintaining his seaweed farming business, amidst the rapid flow of change and the massive tourism sector that damaged the sustainability of the marine ecosystem. Meanwhile, far away in the Transmigration area, Tuwarno (55) a Corn Farmer in Saritani Village, Gorontalo has to face the drought caused by the long dry season. Will they both be able to face the environmental crisis and climate change?.

Title: VRC Museum
Storyline: The VR film immerses viewers in famous paintings by recreating the scenes within a virtual environment, allowing them to experience art from inside the artwork's world, rather than just observing it on a canvas.

Title: Tiempo largo y jodido, que quieres que te diga
Storyline: Chronicles the life of a revolutionary militant.

Title: Spy Hunter 97
Storyline: A down on his luck secret agent and his former partner join forces to thwart a deadly arms dealer. With intense action, gripping suspense, and a story of loyalty and redemption, this film will captivate audiences and keep them on the edge of their seats.

Title: Rainbows Over Plantation
Storyline: Two Australian detectives searching for a maniac begin to believe that he might not be human.

Title: D
Storyline: Jane is a reporter who is given a second chance at her career. On the day of her interview, a home invader named The Creeper invades her home to demand she summon the masked vigilante Cobra.

Title: Third Wave
Storyline: The story of competing Montreal Third Wave coffee roasters who both work together and clash as they improve their craft, exposing the fervent passion and love for coffee that goes behind making your morning cup of Joe.

Title: Rajwant
Storyline: Jagdeep, a soldier, meets mysterious Rajwant at a desolate station amid a wave of murders targeting newlywed men. Offering her shelter, secrets unravel, blurring love and danger in this gripping, suspenseful tale.

Title: Car Adventure
Storyline: After a man's g-dson is assaulted, the man heads out to North Carolina to help dole out some southern justice.

Title: Island Vibes Documentary
Storyline: Documentary film chronicles the birth of collaborative album of a music group that once dominated the local reggae music industry.

Title: Jaya
Storyline: Despite facing rejection from society due to her father's low social status, Jaya remained determined to complete her education and excel academically. Her father's love and support helped her overcome the obstacles, and she caught the attention of Tripathi's son Shashank during a college event. Jaya was left destitute and gave birth to a son with the help of a pandit. Devastated and disillusioned, Jaya started working in a crematorium, burning dead bodies alone. Despite contracting COVID-19, Jaya recovered and continued working in the crematorium, making it her new home.

Title: All Saints: The Journey of Orthodoxy in Bloomington, Indiana
Storyline: This documentary shares the four-decade journey of a small group of people from different ethnicities and languages as they establish the first Orthodox Church in Bloomington, Indiana. The state of Indiana's religious ties goes back to when it became the 19th state in the union on December 11th, 1816. In the founding documents an entire township would be put aside for education. This township was the City of Bloomington and The Indiana Seminary was established on January 20th, 1820. About 18 years later the seminary would transition to Indiana University.

Title: Mukherjee Nagar: The IAS Factory
Storyline: "Mukherjee Nagar: The IAS Factory" is a powerful investigative documentary that takes viewers deep into the heart of Delhi's Mukherjee Nagar - the symbolic "Mecca" for millions of UPSC aspirants.

Title: Lucy Comes Home
Storyline: Follows Lucille Ball's 1956 journey back to her hometown Jamestown, New York after over 20 years. Her emotional return and its lasting impact on the town explored.

Title: Mabidi Wa Strata
Storyline: A charming yet mischievous man who navigates his community by scamming people and borrowing money. Despite his deceitful ways, Mabidi tries to maintain a semblance of normalcy at home, where he faces his no-nonsense wife, Maria.

Title: Twice A Day at Hunter Farm
Storyline: Plot is a girl kicks her boyfriend out and he returns back to the farm to stalk her with a Halloween mask a local detective comes out of retirement to solve the case.

Title: Twisted America
Storyline: A conflict between two major agencies start to strengthen when Clay Agency CEO Oliver Johnson gets suspicious about another agency called the Arggs ran by Alex Blackwell, and eventually leads to war between the two and other crazy things.

Title: Pravila Filippa
Storyline: Filipp likes to break the rules. This sometimes gets him into trouble. His mother can't always contain his boundless energy. He loves his mother very much, loves having breakfast with her, doing exercises, walking and riding the rides in the park. But when she is at work, Filipp often runs away from home to the nearest coffee shop and watches how coffee is made. Here he has his own life, his own rules and his own dream - Filipp wants to become a barista, because coffee makes people happier. But fulfilling this dream is not so easy - Filipp has Down syndrome.

Title: The Otamatone Project 3: Age of the Kellys
Storyline: After his brother expresses his disappointment in him, Jon Ron Kelly sets out to bring back KellyCorp and use forces of resurrection to plot world domination. Can our heroes stop his insanity?

Title: Point 40
Storyline: Talks about how Isis used Islam as an excuse to do terrors, the movie tells the story in such a comedic way.

Title: North Putnam
Storyline: A feature documentary depicting a year in the life of the North Putnam School Corporation and the community it serves. With empathy, a hyper-real reporting lens and skillfully lush cinematography, the film aims to reach across divides and to spark action-oriented conversations about the interdependence between public schools and community development.

Title: Tui Ke Amar
Storyline: Bishal and Pakhi, in love, move to Kolkata. Bishal starts a job while Pakhi teaches street children and becomes popular. Unaware of her location, Bishal searches for her. Will he find Pakhi in the busy city and reunite with her?

Title: Siete Vidas - El Levanton
Storyline: A couple of small time thieves steal the money from a cartel deal ignoring the money belongs to a powerful Colombian Capo, finding themselves in a perilous situation.

Title: Douglas Stories
Storyline: The result of a two-year oral history project which collected the stories of people living and working in Douglas, gathering reflections on the story of the past and witnessing the changes in a small village that became a suburb of Cork.

Title: Mastermind Chapter 1
Storyline: Iszu (edwin lopez ) ring leader of the tennis Team Is in a tough situation where his team Memeber August wants to quit until Imani Ring leader Takes thing for the darkest turn with Jason (Julian Castellanos )

Title: The Paper Man
Storyline: This film follows Alexander Parnis, a philologist who revived interest in Velimir Khlebnikov and futurists. He unearthed lost texts, lived ascetically, worked tirelessly in archives, and inspired us with his dedication, and charisma.

Title: In Search of Recommendations
Storyline: "This is a full documentary from writers, directors, YouTubers, wrestlers, journalists, podcasters, comic artists, singers, animators and voice artists - all giving their recommendations of a horror movie that they love. Inspired by the 'In Search of Darkness' series and by my respect for all the people I've met over the years who love horror as much as I do."

Title: Heartbreak in August
Storyline: In the vibrant city of Bayelsa State, Nigeria, Quiries, a talented musician and hardworking mechanic, is deeply in love with Dera, a girl from a well-to-do family. Despite their strong connection, Dera's parents disapprove of Quiries, seeing him as unworthy of their daughter due to his lower social status. One evening, Dera invites Quiries to her home for dinner, hoping to sway her parents' opinion. However, the night ends in disaster as her parents humiliate Quiries and force him out of their home. Devastated and embarrassed, Quiries decides to leave Nigeria for America, where he plans to pursue his dream of becoming a successful musician. He hopes to return one day with fame and wealth to win back Dera and prove her parents wrong. The night before his departure, Quiries and Dera meet in secret at a hotel, determined to share one last, passionate night together. But the next morning, Quiries is shocked to find Dera lifeless beside him. In an instant, Quiries' world unravels. Instead of boarding a plane to a new life, he is thrust into a nightmare of suspicion and arrest. Accused of a crime he didn't commit, Quiries' dreams are shattered as he faces the grim reality of imprisonment, his once bright future lost forever.

Title: It Starts in This Room
Storyline: A fledgling music producer raises a million dollar bail to ensure his star rapper's record gets released as planned.

Title: One level higher
Storyline: The existence of the entire planet is threatened by a scientist who delved too deep into the micro-world.

Title: Tradition: A Story from Glengarry
Storyline: Documentary Series, following the community of the Glengarry Highland Games, the largest in the world and the people of Glengarry, Ontario, Canada, learning how the traditions of the Highlands of Scotland found a new home in Canada.

Title: In Perpetual Nostalgia Tales of the Military Dependents' Villages in Literature
Storyline: In the heart of Taiwan, tales of military dependents' villages unfold as a tapestry, woven with threads of history and memory, a jewel in global literature's crown, birthed under martial shadow. These villages, erstwhile refuges for the displaced, now stand as silent sentinels of change, embodying a blend of sorrow and resilience, yearning and belonging. In Perpetual Nostalgia: Tales of the Military Dependents' Villages in Literature embarks on a literary odyssey, exploring the collective soul through interviews, reenactments, and melodies, inviting reflection on the profound connections between land, lineage, and the indelible marks of history.

Title: Family album
Storyline: Family album story of one family picture about Cat. Cat is complex personality, he look for comfort and very communicable. Cat ginger cat you can see anywhere. Cat run in trouble after one little story with neighbors cat's.

Title: Moving Targets
Storyline: In spite of a broken and fallen world, hope is found through a historical book.

Title: Daughters of Monster Magnet
Storyline: A coming-of-age tale of tragic Love turns into a surreal vision of death, rebirth, desire, and beauty.

Title: Even Sally
Storyline: Sally is a single mom of a precocious teenager who makes electrical music with her band Teddy.

Title: Enkeltje Vrijheid
Storyline: One-Way Ticket to Freedom is a gripping documentary that follows the story of 25-year-old Ahmed from Sudan. When war broke out in Darfur, he fled his country and embarked on a harrowing journey to the Netherlands. Director Diederick Groenewoud and cameraman Bruce Allemende followed him during the final leg of his trek, from the Italian Alps to the gates of Ter Apel, offering a rare glimpse into the life of a refugee on the move.

Title: The Silly Billies: Live in Your Lounge Room!
Storyline: Join The Silly Billies live on stage for a song and dance party. The most fun you'll ever have without in your lounge room.

Title: El Camino del Calupoh
Storyline: Through intimate testimonies from breeders, dog lovers, and the support of UNAM academics, explore the history and deep emotional ties that exist between humans and the third Mexican dog the Calupoh.

Title: Searching for Goodness
Storyline: Acclaimed filmmaker Bessy Adut ensues a call for immediate action to curb the destructive effects on our environment and mankind before it's too late.

Title: Bob & Milo
Storyline: World famous detective Milo Thorne partners with Bob the bumbling buffoon to solve a murder mystery. Can they follow leads, bust drug deals, and stop the Italian mafia before its too late?

Title: Broken Piece
Storyline: A married couple who fight constantly try to find common ground through faith.

Title: O Bixiga é Nosso!
Storyline: In 2023, when the constructions on a subway line revealed material traces of the existence of the first urban quilombo recognized in the history of the state of SP, the community came together to try to prevent this erasure of history.

Title: Interpreters Wanted
Storyline: Interpreters Wanted - a story 14 years in the making - centers around Saifullah Haqmal and his brother Ismail, educated Afghan men who choose to work with U.S. forces as interpreters, and Robert Ham, one of the Soldiers they befriended in their years of service to the United States. As Robert's deployment comes to an end, Saifullah and Ismail's support to U.S. forces continue for years afterward - living in the combat zone of Afghanistan isn't a one-year tour for them, it's their day-to-day life. As the Taliban threat to the Haqmal brothers' lives grows more urgent, their communication with their old friend Robert becomes more desperate, as they wait years for their Special Immigrant Visa (SIV) approval. As Afghanistan's elected government enters its final days, and the country crumbles around them, see the struggle one interpreter has to escape as the Taliban close in. This compelling story is a powerful reminder of the sacrifices made by these interpreters and the struggles they faced - and a stark reminder of our obligations to the people who put themselves in harms' way to support our operations.

Title: Twin Falls, 2001-2024
Storyline: A man with a super 8mm camera reacts to the news of the attack on the Twin Towers by filming everything around him.

Title: Pilgrim in Thailand
Storyline: This is a film about contemporary pilgrimage as a sustainable alternative to mass tourism. A documentary that not only explores the harms of mass tourism but also highlights the benefits of developing spontaneous individual tourism. An interpretation of the contemporary meaning of pilgrimage that examines every aspect of the classical understanding of spiritual journey through the eyes of two travelers in love.

Title: Ah My Goddess: Bad Goddess One Wish
Storyline: Robin Williams is put on Trial in the Afterlife for the Crime of Taking His Own Life, and Marlon Wayans is his Lawyer. During Trial Recess the Two of Them visit Gotham City from Tim Burton's Batman.

Title: Ferris State University: Legacy of Opportunity
Storyline: This documentary explores the rich history of Ferris State University. From the start, Woodbridge and Helen Ferris had one goal: provide an opportunity to anyone willing to learn. This legacy continues 140 years later. Collaboration, diversity, ethical community, excellence, learning, and opportunity all feature within this film as students, staff, faculty, administrators, and community members share their Ferris "story" and further the legacy of opportunity.

Title: The Girl Who Wished a Change
Storyline: A 13 year old girl from London, caught up with lung cancer caused due to air pollution, decides to take on the fight against the world leaders to make a real difference in air pollution and climate change.

Title: Diego of the Dead 2
Storyline: It's The Day Of The Dead and Diego, the cutest skeleton in the underworld launches a comedy contest just in time for the Dia De Muertos festivities. Join us for an underworld adventure like no other, it's Diego Of The Dead 2.

Title: Jiboner Chuktinama
Storyline: Zeeshan, a Bangladeshi-American, marries Sunehra to save his mother's life, but as illness and hidden motives emerge, their contractual relationship blossoms into unexpected love.

Title: The Burden
Storyline: "From Silence to Healing: Education after Genocide": Documentary contrasts Rwanda's approach to genocide education with Bosnia-Herzegovina's ongoing silence. How teaching history can either heal a nation or leave it divided and at risk?

Title: Olokuta
Storyline: In the small town of Olokuta, a young woman named Jitoni is forced into marriage with Oloye, a wealthy businessman old enough to be her father. This arrangement, driven solely by her father's greed and financial desperation, shatters Jitoni's happiness and strains her relationship with her true love, Olaolu who, ironically, works for Oloye.

Title: Protect Yourself at All Times: The Beginning
Storyline: The creator of Protect Yourself at All Times (Adrian Clark) takes viewers back to the beginning of his boxing journey to show us how Protect Yourself at All Times came to fruition.

Title: Slava Komissarenko: Gorit saray, gori i khata
Storyline: Slava Kommisarenko's second solo concert.

Title: Return of the Trumpeters
Storyline: The majestic trumpeter swan, North America's largest waterfowl, was once hunted to the brink of extinction. Thanks to the remarkable efforts of a new generation, this iconic species is making a comeback. Experience one of the greatest conservation success stories of our time.

Title: The Great Gatsberhood
Storyline: Millionaire Jay Gatsby rekindles past romance with cousin Nick's married cousin Daisy through extravagant parties. Jealousy and decadence complicate their tangled love triangle, leading to tragic consequences.

Title: The Silly Billies: Greatest Hits & Best Bits!
Storyline: Kids love parties, holidays and the circus and finally here it all is in one action packed extravaganza.

Title: Euclydes Pinto Martins
Storyline: The work is a tale about the history of Euclydes Pinto Martins (1982-1924). A pioneer of Brazilian aviation, he was the first to pilot an airplane from New York to Rio de Janeiro. Euclydes was from Ceará. born in Camocim and black. He was a remarkable figure in a time were scientific racism prevailed and the ideology of Brazilian society whitening was present. Like other personalities of the time, the image of Pinto Martins suffered whitening. Few know about his real origin story. With a great entrepreneurial spirit, his death was officially stated as suicide; however, Monteiro Lobato has written a book where his death is told as a political assassination driven by the discovery of petroleum in Brazil.

Title: The Donbass Farmer in the Sky
Storyline: The life of Alexander Zakharchenko, the first Head of the Donetsk People's Republic. This film explores the events that happened in Donbass in 2014 and features exclusive interviews with colleagues, friends, and family members.

Title: An Apple Tree Inside the Head
Storyline: Montu Mridha scours the whole village to find his mentally unstable wife when she disappears. When a priest gives him an apple as a cure, it becomes a mission to find her and feed it to her.

Title: AnBan - Soulmates Mein
Storyline: AnBan - Soulmates Mein" is a captivating short film that explores the contrasting souls in a passionate love story. The film delves into the lives of a married couple, who, like two sides of a coin, possess opposing perspectives on life. The wife, a fiercely ambitious and empowered woman, embraces her liberal values, while the husband, deeply protective, holds a more cautious and traditional mindset. As the story unfolds, doubts arise within the husband's heart, questioning his wife's love and accusing her of being too materialistic. However, through a series of compelling events, the wife's unwavering affection and genuine love for her husband are revealed, shattering his misconceptions. "AnBan - Soulmates Mein" beautifully portrays the complexities of love and the power of understanding, as the couple discovers that their differences in worldly perspectives do not diminish their deep connection. Through their journey, they learn to appreciate and respect each other's unique qualities, ultimately strengthening their bond as soulmates. This short film serves as a reminder that love transcends societal norms and expectations, and that true understanding and acceptance can bridge any divide. "AnBan - Soulmates Mein" is a heartfelt exploration of love, trust, and the transformative power of genuine connection.

Title: Roberto Farias: Memórias de Um Cineasta
Storyline: Marise Faria did a tribute for her father: Roberto Farias, an important Brazilian producer and film maker. The documentary throws light for his leadership behind Brazilian Cinema Union during Militar Dictatorship.

Title: The Openers
Storyline: A group of Philly comedians navigate the challenges of the stand-up circuit, open mics - and what happens when it all comes to a standstill in 2020.

Title: Love with Condition
Storyline: Caught in the grip of escalating and inexplicable medical afflictions, a wife's stable life begins to unravel. As her health fails, the dark secrets of her past resurface, forcing her to confront a shocking truth hidden within the only crime she didn't commit.

Title: Blossomele
Storyline: When a young girl moves to her grandmother, she discovers that a boy the size of a little finger lives in the basement. He owns a magical amulet inherited from his grandfather. Together, they figure out how it works and are taken on a journey that will change their lives.

Title: Javad: From Shahpour with Love
Storyline: Exploring the story of iconic Kucheh Bazaari singer, Javad Yasari.

Title: Island Vibes Documentary
Storyline: This documentary film chronicles the birth of collaborative music album and reunion of a music group that once dominated the local reggae music industry. The Coastal ambient of a pollution-free island serves as both the background and the inspiration.

Title: RK Puramlo?
Storyline: Hero is inspector and is on investigation on serial murders in the village, heroine ( wife of inspector ) belongs to the same village, finally hero's wife will get arrested by hero himself for these murders, the story is around why?

Title: Safe and Sound
Storyline: Focuses on the piano learning and family life of several children who may coexist with leukemia for life before returning to school. Explore the education and survival problems faced by children with leukemia.

Title: El caso Freytter
Storyline: Jorge Freytter returns to Colombia after 17 years in exile to investigate the murder of his father.

Title: Boring Saga
Storyline: A collection of four short films of different genres and emotions.

Title: Victoria para el teatro puertorriqueño
Storyline: Documentary about the life and works of Puerto Rican theatre director Victoria Espinosa.

Title: No Attachment Territory
Storyline: For many years Russia has set an example for such western countries as Canada and the USA in developing and running wildlife preserves. Today our scientists are working on contactless ways of studying and saving wild animals; visual contact with humans often causes animals to develop attachment issues. No Attachment Territory is an extensive research documentary asking relevant and complex questions: to save or not to save, to interfere or not. Should one be a victim, a savior, a pursuer, or just an observer?

Title: Fiebre Caribe
Storyline: A woman in Queens struggles with cannibalistic desires while seeking her missing lover who disappeared en route to Caracas.

Title: Lake Bike Hell
Storyline: David and Maxwell embarked on a polar expedition to cycle the length of frozen Lake Baikal in Siberia, the world's largest lake by volume, stretching 450 miles from north to south. One of the most remarkable aspects of their journey was the kindness and hospitality they continuously encountered in eastern Russia. It's a narrative absent from the news, politics, and Hollywood, making it all the more important to share. In nearly every film ever made, Russians are portrayed as the antagonists, but their experience on this trip was entirely different. This film explores themes of overcoming anxiety and facing near-death experiences, while challenging how we define who our enemies are.

Title: Drink
Storyline: A short poem about our love of alcohol.

Title: In All Truth
Storyline: Ex-convict Kieth Stevens is released from prison after serving 10 years. We follow Kieth for a year as he re-acclimates into an unwelcoming society. gritty and inspiring a Father, son and an ex-con seeks redemption, In All Truth.

Title: The Anthropocene Cycle
Storyline: Spanning across the globe, from the tropics to the arctic, and filmed over a period of 13 years, The Anthropocene Cycle explores human interventions on Earth systems from a decidedly personal point of view. Fragments of the filmmaker's 16mm home movies; explorations in the remote deserts of New Mexico; a speech given by Carl Sagan to Congress in 1985; Norse mythologies as they relate to extinction events, as told by Icelandic poets; an analysis of Alan Moore's 1980's run on the Swamp Thing comic book, about a plant that believes itself to be a man; a brief history of the Earth's five previous mass extinction events; and an extraterrestrial entity that come to Earth to study human activities, The Anthropocene Cycle weaves these and other historical and fictive threads into an audio-visual collage of ideas about what it means to be living on Earth during this period of multispecies peril.

Title: Not Supposed to Be Here
Storyline: Rapper/Content Creator Matty Tingles releases his 9th album "Not Supposed To Be Here". Eight years after his last release, follow Matty over the course of 14 months as he creates the album.

Title: The Middle 3 - Consequence of Contact
Storyline: The Middle 3 is the continuation of stories of extraterrestrial and UFO contact. New witnesses and stories of possible abduction cases.

Title: Angel from Hell
Storyline: A dark kingdom's prophecy hinges on a mission of seduction led by a beautiful agent sent to earth. Her task? To sway the hearts of young men who are destined to protect the kingdom of light.

Title: Mae Nak Talu Miti
Storyline: The plot involves a history teacher named Fon who is passionate about the legend of Mae Nak. After discovering a book about Mae Nak, she and several colleagues are transported into the past to the time of the original legend through a supernatural event. They must then deal with the dangers of that era, including battles and spirits, before finding a way back to their own time.

Title: Cherophobe
Storyline: A depressed writer returns to his apartment with a dark plan, but an unexpected-and possibly supernatural-interruption could turn his life completely back around.

Title: Johnny and the Cursed Bread
Storyline: In 1951, in the small village of Pont-Saint-Esprit in Normandy, a series of food poisonings leads to the deaths of several villagers. Seventy years later, a journalist named Rachel Smith accuses the CIA of being behind the incident. In response, the CIA sends its top agent to intercept Rachel and prevent a diplomatic crisis.

Title: Untitled Ambition: The Journey to Valtoria
Storyline: The story starts with Bella Mors stating to herself that the VPG are quite the tenacious bunch, as she literally had to walk on eggshells to escape them. She managed to elude capture and make her way to the train station as a means to flee Valtoria and head to Esteban to recruit the new heroes who defeated both Anti-Spur and the Hero Slayers. Meanwhile in Esteban, it's another slow day for the ENGA (Esteban's Nation Guild Association), as Justin sits in his office, yawning from boredom about the listlessness transpiring throughout Esteban. Soon afterwards, Kaito Blackwood enters the scene, eagerly asking Justin for any available missions, as the latter assures him that Kaito will be the first to be notified when a new mission request has been received. It's around this time when Bella enters the room and requests help for mission she'd like to hire the ENGA members for. Kaito is immediately starstruck after just a single look at Bella's pure and innocent appearance. The two listened intently as Bella disclosed her physical condition to the heroes. Bella told them that she was cursed by a witch with the "Reverse Midas Touch." Anything Bella touched would turn to mold, rot, break or decay. So, she constantly had to wear special (blessed) gloves to minimize unwarranted contact. As disheartening as her situation was, Justin knew that something just felt "off" about both Bella's story and her condition. He started by saying that he didn't believe that Bella's condition was even a curse at all. Justin admits that he isn't as much of a magic expert as Fidelia when it comes to certain curses, but even he knew that curses almost always have some level of dark, spiritual energy attached to them. Bella's condition had no traces of such energy in her hands whatsoever, and Justin started asking this new client some rather deep questions, such as her relationship to this supposed witch who cursed her and why such an individual would go out of their way to curse an innocent girl in such a profound and unusual way. As Bella struggled to give any convincing answers, Kaito intervened and told Justin that this mission is exactly what the doctor ordered for them, and this would be the perfect way to go out and figure out a way to break this "curse," even if the witch herself is the only one able to do it. So, Justin relents, gives Bella the benefit of the doubt, and agrees to take on her mission. The trio then fetches Ike as the four travel by train to the country of Valtoria. Upon arrival in Valtoria, the trio were surprised by how Bella was raised in such a peaceful, quaint village in the middle of a sunny meadow. Justin began to question Bella's claims even further as to how and why would a witch be located in the heart of such a lovely place. Bella retorted that in Valtoria, looks are often very deceiving. Many people in this region regard Lyra Noir, the witch who supposedly cursed Bella, and her team as saviors in this region. Bella even claims that the inhabitants of Valtoria are all under Lyra's spell to paint both herself and her minions as heroes, much to the ire of JSA. So, the trio spent hours looking for clues about a stereotypical witch located in Valtoria, but to no avail. Their search seemed fruitless until a familiar face, Velda, was spotted by Kaito, and she explained her reason for traveling to these parts. Velda was hired by some officials in her country, the Northern Heights Region, to locate an ancient monster sealed away in Valtoria to exterminate and bring back remnants to get compensated. Kaito, in return, explained his situation to Velda, and she gave the trio a valuable clue. Earlier in her visit, Velda spotted an old castle located just outside of the village. The inhabitants told her that the castle belonged to the VPG and that the group wouldn't be returning until this evening. So, Velda suggested that the VPG would be the first to help the trio out in their mission with Bella Mors once they returned. So, the trio, along with Bella, waited until evening for the VPG's return to the castle. That night, the trio saw a striking individual that fit the description Bella told JSA about Lyra Noir. The tall, slender woman dressed in black, covered in piercings and tattoos, was definitely the target. Justin urged Bella to head to a safe location to hide once the confrontation was over, to which Bella complied. Meanwhile, the JSA trio successfully infiltrated the VPG's castle, where Justin overheard Lyra scolding Thundergut Pike about letting Bella escape her room under his watchful eye. Pike explained to Lyra that prior to her escape, Bella gave him a sandwich along with some "extra-fizzy" soda that caused Pike to fall asleep and give Bella the opportunity to escape. Petite Piper adds that she went to Bella's room and found tasteless sleeping drugs under Bella's bed for the child to make her planned escape. Their conversation confuses Justin, as he starts to wonder if Bella was being held prisoner in the castle prior to her escape. If so, then the VPG are even more of a threat than he initially thought. Suddenly, Kaito knocks over a glass object, causing the VPG to be alerted to JSA's presence. An inevitable fight took place. Thundergut Pike is huge, obese man dressed a superhero, yet his super speed should be impossible to achieve. Pike was so fast that Kaito started to tire himself out trying to land a single hit on Pike until he collapsed from exhaustion. Petite Piper fought against Ike, who initially wanted to go easy on such a small individual. That all changed when Piper's super strength from her single punch kicked in and knocked Ike unconscious. Finally, Justin tried using his magic to help his teammates, only for Jebediah Jones (an unkept country bumpkin) to sneak up from behind and use his psychic abilities to drain Justin's spiritual essence until the blue hero collapsed from exhaustion. JSA was unambiguously defeated in their fight against the VPG. One could easily assume that this was the end for the trio. However, the final member of the VPG was a hulking, muscular giant by the name of Gideon "Goliath" Gray. This priestly, gentle giant used profound healing arts to restore the trio and properly explain himself and the entire situation to JSA. In return, Justin both thanks Gideon and apologizes for the misunderstanding that they were all hired by Bella to undo the curse that Lyra Noir put on their client. Gideon laughs and drops a massive bombshell: both Lyra and Bella are sisters. Ever since their powers awakened, Bella has always coveted her older sister Lyra's saintly powers. This news utterly leaves the JSA trio mind-blown. Afterwards, Gideon escorts the trio back upstairs, where they're reintroduced to Lyra Noir. Upon closer inspection, Justin was able to sense the pure, magnetic energy flowing from Lyra to debunk the claim that the saintess dressed in black being a witch couldn't be any further from the truth. The JSA trio again deeply apologizes for the misunderstandings leading up to a misguided breaking and entering scheme that led to a fight, in which Lyra laughs and forgives them. She told them that wasn't the first time Bella sent people to challenge the VPG and that Bella's attempts to turn people against us usually fail spectacularly. Lyra stated that she honestly couldn't blame JSA for being misled by Bella to fight the VPG due to her appearance and that their group occasionally finds themselves sorting out misunderstandings from time to time. It comes with the territory of being a member of the Valtorian Paradoxical Guards. As both sides continue talking, Lyra explains to JSA that, just as Justin stated earlier, Bella's condition isn't a curse but rather a reflection of the inner turmoil she harbors in her heart. In the past, both Gideon and Lyra have healed Bella's condition multiple times, only for Bella's "Reverse Midas Touch" to return even quicker with each heal. At first, Bella was normal for a few days, but after each time she received healing, her condition not only worsened but returned even faster, to the point where both Gideon and Lyra's healing became ineffective. If Bella could get rid of the malice she has in her heart toward her sister, even Lyra agreed that Bella would be an even greater healer than herself. Justin deduced two things from this: The more jealous Bella grew of Lyra's powers, the faster the Reverse Midas Touch returned and worsened. Also, people are full of pride. Instead of practicing mindfulness and doing inner work, people like Bella don't want to change and just want a quick, easy fix to their problems. This revelation confuses Lyra because, throughout their childhood, Bella was the golden child who got everything she wanted, while despite this, Lyra always made Bella's and those around her happiness a priority. I guess this would be the root cause of where their powers originated and the clear dichotomy between them. Both sides start wondering where Bella went after all this time, in which she's now seen in a crystal cave awakening an ancient entity to finally cure her condition. Bella starts gloating to herself, saying that those three stooges were the perfect distraction to keep the VPG preoccupied while she enacted her true motives. This is a terrible side of Bella's true character: if Gideon or Lyra didn't heal the JSA trio and decided to eliminate them, Bella wouldn't have cared in the slightest. This highlights a ruthless individual who is willing to sacrifice others or do whatever it takes to achieve their goal. Bella uses her "Reverse Midas Touch" to simply touch the crystalline walls imprisoning the ancient, blue jinn. Legends say that once an individual awakens a jinn from their slumber, they must grant the wish of their liberator. Bella makes a simple yet sincere wish to the stoic, blue jinn and wishes to receive healing from her condition, even going as far as declaring to do whatever it takes to achieve it. The blue jinn responds with a sinister grin and demands that both Bella and he shake on it, to which Bella complies. Suddenly, Bella's starts convulsing, and her screams are loud enough to be heard by a nearby Velda who was searching for clues in the middle of the forest at night. Velda hears Bella's shrieking and runs back to the VPG's castle for help, telling them all about the current situation. Both sides follow Velda into the crystal cave, where she hears Bella's screams taking place. They all travel to Bella's location within the cave and find an otherworldly entity standing before them all. Bella ended up becoming a host to the malevolent blue jinn. Her previous human appearance, which once portrayed undeniable, youthful innocence, was now replaced with something straight out of an alien or fantasy movie. Bella now possessed long, white flowing hair, pointy, elongated ears, pale-white skin, and reddish-purple eyes to go along with a black, primal outfit. The jinn in Bella's body took a good look at Velda was surprised that even after all this time, the crimson-haired huntresses of the Wolfjäger bloodline still exist to this day. However, Lyra cared less about the history lesson and demanded that the blue jinn release her sister immediately. However, the jinn (in Bella's body) replied that Bella agreed to his terms to take away her self-induced curse and gave the jinn full access to her body as part of their agreement. Lyra vows to break that agreement and use her powers to purge the jinn straight out of Bella's body. The jinn responds by summoning hordes of evil mirror clones from the reflective crystals in the cave to fight against the heroes. This power causes Velda to have flashbacks of her fight with the late Hero Slayer member Nancy. Justin and the other VPG members, like Gideon, Jebediah, and Lyra, were all struggling with these creatures until Justin asked Velda how she dealt with them. Velda replied that the clones were very tenacious and difficult to defeat with their own strength. Velda was a fire-type user, so Nancy summoned a mirror clone of Velda that was water-type, and the tedious fight continued until Nancy and her zombie brethren were drawn by something else, leading them out of the stadium to pursue, causing the undead menace to cancel her mirror magic and leave the stadium along with the other zombies. Justin's states that it was most likely the "Last Supper" elixir that spilled on Anti-Spur that drew the zombies away from Velda and the other fighters. Velda then concluded that they couldn't expect the same miracle to happen twice, especially in a situation like this where Velda's mirror clone returned with a vengeance. Everything started to look grim until Thundergut Pike, Petite Piper, and Kaito all came to the rescue to destroy the mirror clones, with Kaito (despite not having any superpowers) eliminating dozens of the mirror clones. This gave Velda a window of opportunity to shoot her blazing light arrow from her legendary flame bow to distract the possessed Bella, giving Lyra the chance to pray and cast out the jinn inhabiting Bella's body. The jinn screamed in agony and made a chilling statement in his final moments of being purged. Though Lyra purged the jinn from Bella's body, the jinn's influence would continue to leave an indelible mark on Bella's appearance, thanks to their agreement. As he disappeared, the jinn laughed, saying that the Bella they once knew is now lost to them forever. After the jinn's purging, there's a deep silence in the atmosphere as an unconscious Bella, whose appearance still remains in her possessed state, lies silently on the ground. Lyra tries to heal and restore her younger sister's human form, but to no avail. This happens until Bella finally wakes up and is embraced tightly by Lyra, who's glad to see her sister's mind returning to her. However, the same wasn't true for Bella's body, as she got up and looked into the reflective crystals, only to see a complete stranger staring back at her. Bella lamented after seeing where her actions had finally led her. She was now forced to navigate through life with this strange, otherworldly appearance. Lyra woefully apologized and blamed herself for this outcome, stating that if she had worked harder to cure Bella's condition, all of this could've been avoided. Bella finally takes a stand and admits her wrongdoings to her sister, saying that Lyra was always the one apologizing for her bad behavior. Bella admitted that Lyra gave her clear instructions to do the inner work, and yet she was blinded by jealousy and abstinently chose to do things her way. After all these years of envy, bitterness, and deception, Bella states that she finally paid the price for it all, and this was her just reward. Bella deeply apologizes to both Lyra and JSA for all the trouble she's caused them, and they all unanimously sympathize with and forgive her. Kaito even tries to bring levity into Bella's situation by stating he truly understands Bella and vows to stand by her side as they both go through this together. Also, Kaito states that Bella now reminds him of those elven heroines in the fantasy movies he likes to watch. This cheers Bella up as she embraces and caresses Kaito. To everyone's surprise, Kaito's wounds from the previous battle have all begun to heal. Gideon is driven to tears and exclaims to Lyra that Bella has finally acquired the saint's touch. It was truly a Christmas miracle. Despite this drastic change, Bella was now able to heal just like her big sister, Lyra. This only strengthened Kaito's resolve to remain by Bella's side, as both Justin and Ike agreed to let Kaito pursue a life with Bella in Valtoria while the two returned to Esteban. Before their departure, Bella thanks Velda, Justin, and Ike by giving them all bags of rare Valtorian gems to cash in or keep as souvenirs. Before Justin and Ike board the train back to Esteban, Velda catches up with them and lets them know that she's still waiting on her rematch with Lady Violet. Justin then tells Velda that only time will tell as both sides return to their respective destinations. Upon returning to Esteban, both Justin and Ike take the Valtorian gems to a teller and discover that the gems are extremely valuable. The End.

Storyline: College sweethearts Sid and Anahita's enduring romance spans decades, weathering life's ups and downs with unwavering love and cherished memories.

Title: To the Moon

Agulu is smuggling Earth's aphrodisiac resources to Nibiru. When Hamdi and his crew reveal this secret, they are eliminated by the Anunnaki.

Storyline: A drug dealer begins to question his life choices when his violent partner-in-crime is released from prison.

Storyline: A group of hardworking ladies try to keep things running smoothly at Paradise, one of the hottest, women-owned gentlemen's clubs in Atlanta.

Title: Viktor

Title: Midwinter
Storyline: A burgeoning music writer spends a romantic weekend on an assignment with a queer indie artist she admires. Meanwhile, her older sister deals with the complexities of motherhood, an expanding marriage, and a slow but ferocious illness.

Based on the feature film "The Elfkins - Baking a Difference" and inspired by the famous German saga and poem by August Kopisch.

Title: FanGirl

Storyline: A gang of outlaws defend their hideout until they discover a shocking secret about who they are and what they're up against. Now it's a race against time as they look for a way to escape certain doom at the hands of the Clone Cops.

Storyline: A disabled couple in their 50s, Patrice and Garry, want to marry but risk losing their benefits if they do. Despite the risk, they decide to hold a commitment ceremony.

Title: On Saniye
Storyline: The thrilling duel of a guidance counselor and a mother who will do anything to get her child accepted back to the most prestigious high school in the country after being expelled.

Title: Sucha Soorma
Storyline: A 100+ year-old story of the legendary rebel, the famous Punjab da Kissa, Sucha Soorma!

Title: Hitler
Storyline: A hero with a genuine background involved with the political murders. What is the reason behind this that's the Story.

Storyline: Laura, a talented influencer and beloved friend to many, struggles as she becomes paralyzed due to a horrific accident caused by her lover, Jojo.

His son Tristan, who aspires to become an orthodox priest, finds himself alone with his grieving mother. Gabriel, his older brother with a troubled past, reappears and returns from a long exile to make amends by washing away his family's honor.

Title: Men of War
Storyline: A former U.S. Green Beret is recruited to remove Venezuela's president and after the mission fails, he is pursued by the government he faithfully served.

Title: Bambi: A Tale of Life in the Woods
Storyline: From birth, Bambi is close to his mother, learning survival in the forest. He makes friends, but after hunters kill his mother, he becomes an orphan. With guidance from his father, Bambi learns to navigate life's dangers and matures.

The story is told through narration, interviews, Schindler's theoretical writings, correspondence, photos, renderings, archival and new footage of many of his buildings.

Title: Bernadette will töten
Storyline: A desperate woman feels the urge to kill and enters the dark net - what could possibly go wrong?

Storyline: To stage a masterpiece of a heist, you need time, friends, and balls. Steve has two of the three.

Storyline: When a lone woman is attacked and brutally dismembered a chain of events is set off around the globe bringing a new form of evil into existence. With each full moon, the brutal attacks escalate.

Title: Coffintooth

Storyline: A young American in Paris meets a woman with a morbid curiosity for the darker sides of the city's history.

Title: Gumasthan
Storyline: Cunning clerk exploits legal loopholes to murder wife, evading suspicion. As public and police close in, they race to outwit his intellect and unravel the mysteries shrouding his crime and home.

Storyline: When a dedicated rescue worker inadvertently gets caught up in the kidnapping plot of a mogul's tween daughter, he must save her from the clutches of rival gangs hunting them down with unpredictable dangers around every corner.

Reassigned in the very remote Pulo Penal Colony, he must also confront the horrific realities of his present situation.

Title: Chiclets
Storyline: The thought processes between the kids and their parents. Their thoughts about love and lust and how their parents try to gel up with them.

Storyline: Join Olivia and friends plus a lovable skunk at Camp Clover as they outsmart international spies from stealing her dad's secret invention in a wild summer adventure.

Storyline: Explores Jerry Lewis' unreleased 1972 film "The Day The Clown Cried", its mysterious disappearance, and the search for footage. Includes interviews with Lewis' associates and previously unseen production content.

Title: Aïcha
Storyline: Explores how far one can go to break free from their past.

Storyline: We have had too much medicine for too many years. The time to act is now. How one doctor's fight against corporate greed led to an ancient, life-changing solution for heart disease.

Storyline: When reformed gambler Lucky falls victim to a tax scam, he returns to playing poker to recover his losses while his family struggles to make ends meet.

Title: Silvio
Storyline: During a kidnapping, television personality Silvio Santos must fight to protect his family and his legacy while facing one of the most challenging moments of his life.

Storyline: An evil cult leader combines his evil with a prehistoric dinosaur to seek revenge on the community that destroyed his flock.

Title: All Stirred Up!
Storyline: A chef is enlisted to help a young girl win a culinary competition.

Storyline: Ilia's incredible journey from a childhood in war-torn Georgia to becoming a champion of the world. Overcoming obstacles with unwavering support, he faces the ultimate challenge of his life.

Storyline: A father's ice sculpture of a princess magically comes to life, causing unexpected disruptions in the lives of those she meets.

Amid this sensory barrage, themes of sexual violence, community, confidence and joy are explored.

Title: Alpha.

She finds it difficult to adjust to the new environment, and a group of girls in her class seem to dominate the entire school. Fanny befriends the former leader of the group, Lilja, to form an alliance and do whatever it takes to become popular, have the same opportunities and get into the right circles. But the power struggle has a price, and what is the point of being popular if you don't even have a friend you can trust?

Title: Don't Cry, Butterfly
Storyline: In a suburban town near Hanoi in the early 2000s, housewife Tam finds out that her husband is cheating on her. Instead of confronting him, she voodoos her husband back into love.

Title: Sattam En Kaiyil
Storyline: An accident leads Gowtham to conceal a body in his car. Arrested for drunk driving, his impounded vehicle at the police station holds the hidden corpse. Complications ensue, compelling him to find an escape from the perilous circumstances.

Through this experience, they, along with the filmmaker, gain unexpected self-insight, leading to a profound understanding of their identities and roles in our transformed world.

Title: Lord of Wolves

Storyline: The 2024 election is in danger: 8,500 vigilante vote-fraud hunters have already challenged the rights of 850,000 voters. Journalist Greg Palast hunts down the MAGA vigilantes including one dressed like Doc Holliday-with loaded 6-guns.

Title: Saba

Storyline: The Huan Long family has lived and fought with dragons since ancient times. In the Dong Wenguang generation, they suddenly turned their backs on the dragon and I seal all the Kowloon Kings. In order to gain his father's approval, Dong Yiming Ignoring Dong Wenguang's interference, he secretly investigates Yong Jin-joo's whereabouts. But he is just a pawnshop in a game where everyone is a hidden mastermind, You discover that the truth behind it is still not the ultimate truth.

Title: Min evige sommer

Title: De wilde Noordzee
Storyline: Flora and fauna in the North Sea; a spectacular underwater world unknown to most.

Title: Triumph
Storyline: After the Fall of Communism in the early 1990s, a classified task force of high-rank Bulgarian Army officers led by a psychic channeler starts digging a hole in search of a mysterious artifact which will bring about the ultimate triumph.

Title: Monkey King Fight Lion Camel

Title: Saturn

Title: The Reverse Side of the Medal

After suffering a severe injury in a car accident, Nazik was forced to step away from competitive sports for seven years. Despite facing immense skepticism and enduring excruciating pain, she made a remarkable comeback, reclaiming her title as a two-time European champion. Her story is a powerful testament to the resilience of the human spirit and the unwavering determination that makes the impossible achievable.

Title: To Kill a Mongolian Horse
Storyline: On the wintry Mongolian steppes, Saina's dual life as a herdsman and horseback performer unravels as he grapples with the dissolution of the traditional way of life.

Title: The Wolves Always Come at Night
Storyline: A young Mongolian couple's lives are uprooted when climate change forces them to leave their rural home for the city, where they must adapt to an unfamiliar way of life.

Title: Killer Babes
Storyline: Three girlfriends, neglected and mistreated by their husbands, plan to take revenge on them with the help of an experienced man in this type of job.

Title: Finalement

Title: Nandhan
Storyline: When a village panchayat gets classified as a reserved one, an affluent upper-caste ex-president makes his oppressed house help the new president in order to retain power

Title: The Weedhacker Massacre
Storyline: How many remakes of bad horror movies can you remake? The cast of WeedHacker Massacre film where murders occurred 10 years ago. Bad acting, bounced payroll checks and the killer's return threaten what is to become their worst movie ever.

Title: Ghosted
Storyline: An African American playboy and his wing man are abducted after a blind date gone wrong.

Title: Skeet
Storyline: After being released from prison, Billy Skinner returns to his low-income neighbourhood feeling like the area has changed dramatically, and what was once a predominantly white neighbourhood is now mostly occupied by refugee families.

Title: En af os ryster
Storyline: When Silvia and Mikkel fall in love with each other, a hope for understanding and recognition arises, but it all hurts when there is so much at stake.

Title: Love, Sitara
Storyline: A love story between a Malayali girl and a Punjabi chef, complicated by the family members on each side.

Title: Really Happy Someday
Storyline: Z, a transmasculine theatre performer, bombs a pivotal musical theatre audition, unable to control his voice after starting testosterone 12 months earlier. To save his own life and livelihood, Z must rediscover himself and his voice.

Title: Choke
Storyline: A 911 dispatcher, Leanne, receives a call from beyond the grave that leads her on a journey to find the source of an evil that stalks the small town of Oaktown.

Title: Haft rooz
Storyline: Imprisoned activist Maryam gets rare medical leave from Iran. She must choose between escaping or continuing her battle for human rights and democracy.

Title: Legacy of Zyzzyx Road
Storyline: Follows the making of Zyzzyx Road with never before seen footage, writer/director commentary, and interviews in celebration of the 20th anniversary Collector's Edition of Zyzzyx Road.

Title: American Trash
Storyline: A war veteran suffering from PTSD finds solace in the company of a free-spirited environmentalist. Bonding over shared secrets the couple navigate the streets of Venice California in search of happiness. However, their romance takes an unexpected turn.

Title: Shukrana
Storyline: A close-knit family living in a rural community navigate marriage proposals and pregnancies, alongside a tragedy which threatens to tear them apart in this Punjabi language comedy drama.

Title: Sikaar
Storyline: A Tea garden worker Sankar must apply his hunting skills when he travels from India to London so he may save his fiancé.

Title: The Assistant 2
Storyline: When a young woman infiltrates a family who may help her learn more about her estranged twin sister, she transforms from a nanny to a monster.

Title: Seni Memahami Kekasih
Storyline: Agus, who is described as an intelligent, agile and tough man, whose behavior is effective in winning the heart of his partner, Kalis. The love story of Agus and Kalis during their courtship will be full of twists and turns.

Title: Takedown
Storyline: A troubled teen struggles to balance between life in wrestling and his love for the arts.

Title: Heads or Fails
Storyline: Armande Pigeon, a chronic unlucky gambler, sees her fortune change when she partners with Ronnie for one night of wins. But with winning streaks, knowing when to quit is crucial.

Title: The Whip
Storyline: A full-time carer plots a daring heist from the Houses of Parliament, in a bid to thwart devastating welfare reforms known as Independence Credit.

Title: Big Bad CGI Monsters
Storyline: Two Scientists are tasked with finding a way to destroy giant mutant Murder Hornets during an invasion. Soon the local snakes begin to enlarge too so they unleash the Cocaine Cougar and Ebola Rex in what results in an all-out battle in LA.

Title: Vampire's House of Cain
Storyline: A detective investigating a series murders is caught in a war between two clans of Vampires and allured by the mysterious man in the center of it all.

Title: Half-Life of Memory: America's Forgotten Atomic Bomb Factory
Storyline: In the suburbs of Denver, the U.S. secretly manufactured thousands of atomic weapons, leaving behind a toxic legacy that will persist for generations.

Title: My Private Line to God
Storyline: Joy believes her birthday gift from Auntie Kay holds a divine power: a direct line to God, activated when two or more gather in His name.

Title: Cinta Dari Timor
Storyline: Without Bintang, the Langit will be dark. A love story thwarted by family and extraordinary tragedy.

Title: The Silver Screen Dreams Cafe
Storyline: Milton had a dream. Now he has a cafe. In a washed-up, rundown seaside town, surrounded by his father's collection of silent movie memorabilia and a mountain of debt. Until Jenna arrives with a second-hand camera and a crazy idea.

Title: Tide
Storyline: Four friends race against the tide in a bay famous for its quicksands, but a lurking threat will aggravate the situation.

Title: One-Way Ticket to the Other Side
Storyline: One-Way Ticket To The Other Side presents a series of deeply personal short films centered around the debut album of the musical duo Pornographie Exclusive (Severine Cayron and Jerome Vandewattyne). It is a cinematic, musical, and surreal journey that follows two stoic outlaws as they wander through a world suspended between end and beginning, dream and reality. Their road trip leads them through strange places and encounters with lost souls, immersing them in both absurd and philosophical reflections. Shot in a guerrilla filmmaking style with a warm, grainy look, each poetic tableau of their adventure weaves together the different segments of this unique anthology directed by international filmmakers. In these parallel realms, it is not the story that inspires the music, but rather the music that gives birth to the stories.

Title: Bhale Unnade
Storyline: Radha, a saree draper, falls for Krishna, who's hesitant about intimacy. Seeking wisdom, Radha understands love's depth beyond physical bonds. But Krishna's parents oppose their marriage, disrupting their relationship.

Title: Rose's Last Session
Storyline: Stranded at her therapist's house during a storm, college student Rose discovers that Dr. Richardson and his wife harbor dark secrets beneath their seemingly normal facade.

Title: Vice Is Broke
Storyline: Huang examines Vice's transformation from indie magazine to media behemoth, interviewing former contributors pivotal to its ascent and decline.

Title: Death Ph.D
Storyline: To graduate early, a group of psych PhD students must spend a night in a haunted house, record their findings, and make it out alive.

Title: Silent Bite
Storyline: A gang of bank robbers take shelter in a motel after a Christmas Eve bank heist, unbeknownst to them they are not the most dangerous thing seeking refuge on this cold Christmas night.

Title: Bad Boyz
Storyline: A directionless schoolboy becomes a goon to impress a girl fascinated by local goons. His decision leads to suspenseful, humorous consequences in the thrilling crime world.

Title: Ainda Somos os Mesmos
Storyline: In 1973, after Pinochet's coup, Chile was one of the most dangerous places in the world. The only apparently safe place was the embassies. Based on real accounts by João Carlos Bona Garcia who spent 42 days inside the Embassy.

Title: Daughter's Daughter
Storyline: Movie explores the mother-daughter relations as well as an and IVF journey.

Title: The Moment: Part 1 - The Party
Storyline: A shy teenage girl heads to a house party-but you decide what happens next. In this interactive A24-style drama, one night, one pill, and one choice could change everything.

Title: The Sisters
Storyline: A series of unexplained missing cases and disturbing deaths start to occur in a faraway village when the Chief's dead daughter comes back to life, unveiling shocking secrets of the village's Forest Demon and the ritual of human sacrifice related to the prosperity of the Chief's family.

Title: Zuzubalândia: O Filme
Storyline: To save the enchanted kingdom of Zuzubaland, where everything is made of food, the little bee Zuzu has to face the Witch, who convinces the other bees to stop pollinating and pursue their long-dreamed-of professions.

Title: Kadha Innuvare
Storyline: An anthology of four unusual stories where each couple fights to be with the ones they love against all odds

Title: SCP: The Infinite Mission
Storyline: On a mission to transport a mysterious subject through the desert, an elite team of agents finds themselves stuck in a quantum loop with a powerful and elusive assailant as they experience different possibilities.

Title: The Lost Legacy of Tony Gaudio
Storyline: De Sica, Fellini, Loren, Benigni, Sorrentino. Many Italians have won an Academy Award®. But who was the first ever?

Title: Odd Fish
Storyline: When two childhood friends get an unexpected opportunity to keep their fish restaurant open all year round, one of them comes out of the closet as a trans woman, putting a strain on their friendship and they see their lives in a new light.

Title: Lover of Men: The Untold History of Abraham Lincoln
Storyline: Examines the intimate life of America's most consequential president, Abraham Lincoln.

Title: Spider-Man: Final Swing
Storyline: The final chapter in the Six Side Studios Spider-Man Saga.

Title: Guardians
Storyline: A charismatic preacher works with guardian angels to save two young women from life-threatening decisions.

Title: Les courageux
Storyline: In a society that doesn't give a damn about people like her, a rebellious mother of three risks everything to get a piece of paradise.

Title: The City God Forgot
Storyline: A woman, paying for the sins of her father, seeks redemption but first endures a series of tribulations.

Title: Twin's Love Trap for Billionaire Dad
Storyline: After a one-night stand with a stranger, Christina becomes pregnant with twins, but tragically, they are stillborn...or at least she believes so.

Title: Querido trópico
Storyline: A pregnant immigrant connects with a wealthy woman suffering from dementia in Panama City, intertwining their lives.

Title: The Woods
Storyline: A woman on a true crime podcast recounts the mysterious story of a hike that resulted in the death of her best friends several years earlier.

Title: Front Row
Storyline: Two feuding matriarchs engage in chaos and dysfunction during a family beach vacation in prolific Algerian director Merzak Allouache's chaotic family dramedy.

Title: Betting with Ghost
Storyline: Centers on a man who becomes a 'God of Gamblers' suddenly with the help of the Ghost.

Title: Aiden
Storyline: In a desperate bid for survival, Aiden flees the suffocating grip of domestic violence and seeks refuge in a remote cabin, where unconventional therapy sessions force him to confront his past, which opens an intriguing twist.

Title: Inedia
Storyline: After a series of mysterious and debilitating allergic reactions to food, a young woman joins a radical community of people who claim to be nourished by light.

Title: Temporary Shelter
Storyline: When Anastasiia Bortuali is displaced to Iceland, she documents her fellow refugees, capturing their fragility and strength against a backdrop of northern lights and volcanic eruptions.

Title: This Is Not a Christmas Movie
Storyline: Approaching Christmas, a family confronts relationship issues: marital tensions, workplace attraction, gender identity crisis, and open relationship dynamics, converging at their annual holiday reunion.

Title: Water Lilies
Storyline: Hyo-won, who dreams of becoming an actress, runs away from country home with Eun-seo. Hyo-won starts taking acting lessons from leading actor Su-yeon to become a member of the theater company. Eun-seo starts to work at a shabby restaurant when Hyo-won's lesson fee is urgent.Su-yeon's voice is steady, her words sharp. "Acting is the art of embodying another's suffering." Hyo-won listens, but the weight of those words eludes her. She cannot yet grasp the depths of Eun-seo's pain, nor can Eun-seo fully see hers. The two drift, parallel yet apart, their lives entangled by need and longing but marred by unspoken distance. For them, life is an unanswered question.

Title: Concepción
Storyline: "Concepción" follows Conchita Cabrera de Armida, a devout Mexican woman balancing family and spiritual devotion. She founded five apostolic works, impacting Mexico and the Church. Her legacy of faith and love continues to inspire.

Title: Baby Brother
Storyline: Set around the theme of broken love between two brothers. BABY BROTHER tells the story of ADAM and his vulnerable younger brother LIAM across two separate days, five years apart. They where once as close as brothers can be.

Title: Third Eye
Storyline: Fanny, a journalist, finds a photo album revealing Christiana's life, an obscure photographer. Investigating, she locates Christiana's exhibited works, including self-portraits with a Love Doll, in Paris.

Title: Udan Chhoo
Storyline: Udan Chhoo is a Gujarati Movie starring Deven Bhojani, Prachee Shah Paandya, Aarohi and Aarjav Trivedi in prominent roles.

Title: Home Free
Storyline: Three estranged sisters reunite for their parents' anniversary, only for their father to reveal he's dying from a brain tumor. His final wish for a perfect weekend together sparks a whirlwind of family secrets and conflict.

Title: I'll Play Mother
Storyline: After the death of their birth mother, two young children are placed in the care of prospective adopter parents, however, it's not long before the new family begin to question if something more sinister is at play.

Title: Night Silence
Storyline: Lucjan is admitted to a nursing home, where he is welcomed by the residents and staff. Everything is fine, there are no dark secrets hidden in the basement, no strange, malevolent creatures. Don't worry about it. Everything - is - fine..

Title: The Man Who Loved UFOs
Storyline: Argentina, 1986. Journalist José de Zer and his cameraman travel to Córdoba after an odd proposal. At a burnt patch in the hills, they depict an alleged alien presence for their news show through increasingly bizarre staged scenes.

Title: Grandma
Storyline: Young woman inherits bed and breakfast with sinister past. Long ago, "Grandma" served human flesh to guests. Now, an old lady attacks new owners, possibly the original Grandma or someone connected to her crimes.

Title: That person has disappeared
Storyline: Set in an apartment building where many people are rumored to disappear one after another, the story begins when Maruko, a young delivery worker, accidentally discovers the secret of a suspicious resident.

Title: Agent 86
Storyline: Drug cartel unleashes lethal narcotic Devil's Breath in Asia. An elite global taskforce forms to combat the cross-border trafficking ring and halt the spread of the potent drug before more lives are destroyed.

Title: After Party
Storyline: Carefree Jindriska's world crumbles when debt collectors arrive to seize her home due to her father's debt. Within a day, she must choose between aiding him or leaving to start anew.

Title: Pwede G, pwede B
Storyline: Basil, a 30-year-old womanizer, has his life turned upside down when he wakes up from a night of drunken sex with his straight best friend, Theo, who is about to be married. Suddenly, every time he tries to hook up with a woman, a man magically appears to have sex with him instead.

Title: The Antique
Storyline: Lado, a Georgian smuggler, transports antiques to St. Petersburg, where he meets Medea, an immigrant at an antique workshop. Vadim, a lonely elderly man, bonds with Medea. Their lives intersect amidst smuggling, survival, and connection.

Title: The Story of Pokemon
Storyline: Pokémon: More than just catching creatures. Uncover the fascinating facts behind the franchise. Join us on a journey to explore the rich history and legacy of the highest-grossing media franchise of all time.

Title: Super Vixens 8
Storyline: 3 tales of sexy super heroines taking on evil.

Title: Star Trek Voyager: The Definitive History
